subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! The colonel in this world seeketh the scent and hue of the battlefield and yearneth after fame and glory, but the true leader [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی سرهنگ جهان بو و رنگ صف جنگ بیاراید و نام و ننگ جوید اما سالار
subcodes.subjects: @war and peace, @symbolism, @unity; oneness of humanity, @call to action, @universal peace; world unity
